title: Casserole Eggplant Bake
description: A delicious and savory eggplant casserole dish, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of casserole and eggplant for a tasty and satisfying meal.
instructions: Cut the eggplant into 1/2-inch thick slices.
Brush both sides of eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt.
In a large skillet, cook the eggplant slices over medium heat until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
In a separate bowl, combine the crushed casserole, shredded irish cheese, and a pinch of salt.
In a 9x13-inch baking dish, arrange a layer of eggplant slices.
Spread half of the casserole-cheese mixture over the eggplant.
Repeat the layers, starting with the eggplant slices, then the remaining casserole-cheese mixture.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
